note: Tier 1 is discussion/forum-first. freshness_default removed — discover.py ranks by recency from snippet instead of using hard DDG freshness filters (which return empty on site: queries).

platforms.label: Reddit
platforms.notes: Highest priority. Search for active threads/questions. curl -L needed (Reddit 301s without trailing slash).

platforms.label: X / Twitter
platforms.notes: Recent public threads/discussions on niche topics. Page fetch blocked; use snippet.

platforms.label: Hacker News
platforms.notes: Tech/startup/crypto niche. Ask HN, Show HN threads, and comment discussions.

platforms.label: BitcoinTalk
platforms.notes: Crypto-focused. Active threads in Altcoin Discussion, Speculation, Services boards.

platforms.label: Indie Hackers
platforms.notes: Startup/SaaS community with active discussion boards.

platforms.label: Quora
platforms.notes: Find questions where the project directly answers user needs.

platforms.label: Stack Overflow
platforms.notes: Technical niches. Look for unanswered or recently active questions.

platforms.label: Stack Exchange
platforms.notes: Network of Q&A sites; covers crypto, money, tech, etc.

platforms.label: Medium
platforms.notes: Find publications accepting submissions. Comment on relevant articles.

platforms.label: dev.to
platforms.notes: Developer community. Guest posts and article comments.

platforms.label: Hashnode
platforms.notes: Developer blogs. Find publications with write-for-us or open submissions.

platforms.label: Substack
platforms.notes: Newsletter authors open to collaboration or cross-promotion.

platforms.label: Product Hunt
platforms.notes: Submit/upvote product listing. Also comment on related product launches.

platforms.label: AlternativeTo
platforms.notes: Directory of software alternatives. Suggest the project as an alternative.
